summary: Backend regression testing after server.py cleanup - all migrated routers (email.py, background_jobs.py, categories.py, beneficiaries.py, demo.py) working correctly. Server.py reduced from ~1129 to ~280 lines (75% additional reduction). All 17 tests PASSED.
passed_tests: Categories - Returns all enum values (purpose_classifications, task_types, minutes_types, entity_types, relationship_types)
Background Jobs - GET /api/background-jobs/status returns scheduler status (running=true, 3 jobs)
Beneficiaries - GET /api/beneficiaries/dashboard returns 402 for trial users (premium feature gating)
Demo - POST /api/demo/seed returns seeded=false for user with existing trusts
Dashboard - GET /api/dashboard works correctly after refactoring
Trusts - GET /api/trusts returns trust list after refactoring
Distributions - GET /api/distributions works correctly after refactoring
Integration - All migrated routers accessible (categories, email, background-jobs, beneficiaries, demo)
Integration - Core routers (trusts, distributions, dashboard, tasks, minutes, subscription) still working
critical_code_review_comments: Server.py refactoring successful - file reduced from ~1129 to ~280 lines (75% reduction, 95% total from original 7600)
All 19 routers properly registered and working
Router organization follows consistent pattern: email.py, background_jobs.py, categories.py, beneficiaries.py, demo.py
Subscription middleware working correctly - read-only enforcement intact
Premium feature gating working (beneficiaries/dashboard returns 402 for trial users)
Background job scheduler running with 3 scheduled jobs: task_status_update, daily_reminders, daily_health_snapshots
Email service configured with Postmark (MOCKED: sandbox mode) - 12 templates available
context_for_next_testing_agent: Server.py cleanup complete. All 19 routers migrated and working. New test file created: test_server_cleanup_routers.py with 17 tests covering: categories (no auth), email status, background jobs status, beneficiaries dashboard (402 for trial), demo seed, plus regression tests for auth, dashboard, trusts, distributions. Email service uses Postmark in sandbox mode (MOCKED).
